MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendis;
Off Calendar Dec-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROSLYN GARDNER Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens:
APPEAR: Lee Ormasa, Esq. 585-2095 for pltf & opposing party; Charles P. Wolff, Esq. 421-0288 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WOOD CLAIM IS REAL PROPERTY CLAIM BUT WOOD FAILS TO ESTABLISH PROBABLE VALIDITY OF CLAIM. REQUEST FOR ORAL TESTIMONY DENIED), and in addition, the Court took the matter under submission re attorneys fees. Each to submit proposed orders with three page letters by 11/18/02. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
